detail: WMI-3 attacker content in authoritative position (preinstalled-pointer-gate): struct field 'psmgr_desc.handler' is used directly when non-null, bypassing the else-branch validation (validated assignment at line 84122). An attacker who pre-installs this field escapes the table-bounds check. \[mechanism:preinstalled-pointer-gate;indicates=WMI-3\] \[mem:struct=psmgr_desc;field=handler;offset=136\] \[oracle:assert=handler holds a table-validated pointer, not attacker-pre-installed content;assume=attacker has pre-written an arbitrary function pointer into the field\]
